parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets the voltage-coded output high level

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the data, clock, and retimed-data decision threshold

parameters.name: trf
parameters.override_behavior: sets output rise and fall smoothing

modeling_constraints: Keep event-triggered state updates separate from unconditional output contributions.
Do not add undeclared artifacts, ports, debug outputs, or validation state.

properties.observable_contract: Each data transition selects UP for clock-high/retimed-low, DOWN for clock-low/retimed-high, and neither otherwise.
UP and DOWN are never asserted simultaneously.
An asserted correction output returns low after the next clock transition.
Asserted outputs approach vdd and inactive outputs approach 0 V with finite smoothing.

title: Bang-Bang Phase Detector
